title: How to subscribe teams to a board created by an automation, within an automation?

posts.author: wastley (William Astley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Within the company I work, all boards on our Monday account should be set to private on creation.
For a specific workflow, I need to automatically create a board with a subscribed team, with an automation. It is possible to set these people manually within the automation, but I would like to set this to subscribe a Team instead of individual people, so as to be future proof and dynamic.

Is there a workaround to make this possible?

Thanks.
